title: limnophila fragrans
intro: Limnophila fragrans, also known as Mosquito Plant or Sweet Melissa, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, often grown for its fragrance and ornamental value. The medicinal properties of Limnophila fragrans include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Limnophila fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine practices.
